scripts.dev:web: if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web dev; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.typecheck:web: if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web typecheck; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.build:web: if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web build; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.test:web: if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web test; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.validate:web: if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web validate; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/server typecheck && bun run build:web
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/server lint && if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web lint; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/server test && bun run test:web
scripts.format:check: bun run --cwd packages/server format:check && if [ -f packages/web/package.json ]; then bun run --cwd packages/web format:check; else echo 'packages/web is not initialized yet'; fi
scripts.validate: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run format:check
